mapper.select:
SELECT NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CREATED_AT FROM NOTICE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY NOTICE_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, USE_YN) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'Y')
